name: github
description: GitHub repository interaction for version control and collaboration

env_vars.GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN: Create at https://github.com/settings/tokens with repo scope

setup_instructions: Create a GitHub Personal Access Token with 'repo' scope. For private repos, ensure token has appropriate permissions.
example_prompts: Create a PR for the current feature branch
Search for implementations of WebSocket in similar projects
Create an issue for the bug we just found
List recent commits on the main branch
security_notes: Use fine-grained personal access tokens when possible
Limit token scope to minimum required permissions
